message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "users" as users1
participant "首页" as home
participant "登录" as login
participant "选择登录身份" as selectRole

users1 -> home : 查看所有学生列表

alt [如果users是老师]
  home -> login
  login -> selectRole
else [如果users是students]
  home -> login
  login -> selectRole
end

actor "users" as users2
participant "首页" as home2
participant "登录" as login2
participant "选择登录身份" as selectRole2

users2 -> home2 : 查看所有学生列表

alt [如果users是老师]
  home2 -> login2
  login2 -> selectRole2
else [如果users是students]
  home2 -> login2
  login2 -> selectRole2
end
@enduml
